text: As I cross the threshold through gleaming glass doors, the world shifts—outside, quiet anticipation; inside, a vibrancy of color, words, and technology. The environment is sleek, modern, almost sterile at first, but stepping closer to 'R+D'—the Responsive and rapidly evolving Development space—I feel a spark of curiosity. Surrounded by reflections, screens, and displays about innovation, it becomes a place for contemplation. Here, even in this constructed order, I sense an undercurrent of play and inquiry, nudging me to ponder how humans and machines dream together. The world seems ripe with potential and possibility.
